description: The file defines a React component for a reports page in an insurance fraud detection platform, enabling report generation with filters and viewing report history.

methods.name: ReportsPage
methods.description: React component for the reports page with filtering and report history features

methods.name: loadHistory
methods.description: Fetches report history and investigators list asynchronously

methods.name: handleGenerate
methods.description: Generates a report based on current filters

methods.name: handleClearFilters
methods.description: Resets all filter inputs to their default empty state

methods.name: renderReportData
methods.description: Renders report data in a structured format
